Batch Remap Multiple Expression Matrices

Source: R/expression-remap.R
batch_remap_expression.Rd

Applies the same annotation and remapping to multiple datasets

batch_remap_expression(
  expression_list,
  updated_annotations,
  qc_flags = NULL,
  method = "median",
  remove_ambiguous = TRUE,
  keep_common_genes = FALSE
)

Arguments

expression_list

List of expression matrices

updated_annotations

Data frame with probe-to-gene mappings

qc_flags

QC results (optional)

method

Aggregation method (default: "median")

remove_ambiguous

Remove ambiguous probes (default: TRUE)

keep_common_genes

Keep only genes common to all datasets (default: FALSE)

Value

List of remapped gene expression matrices

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
  datasets <- list(
    study1 = expr_matrix1,
    study2 = expr_matrix2,
    study3 = expr_matrix3
  )

  remapped <- batch_remap_expression(
    datasets,
    annotations,
    qc_flags = qc_results
  )
} # }
